朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 02:14:51 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 第九巡回法院一致拒绝苹果公司在 Epic Games 案件中的重审请求https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ninth- Circuit-unanimously-denies-apples-rehearing-requests-in-epic-games-case/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ninth- Circuit-unanimously-denies-apples-rehearing-requests-in-epic-games-case/#respondMarcus Mendes Tue, 31 Mar 2026 02:14:51 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045907

苹果今天在针对 Epic Games 的案件中遭受了重大挫折，第九巡回法院驳回了其两项重审请求。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ninth- Circuit-unanimously-denies-apples-rehearing-requests-in-epic-games-case/feed/ 0 1045907 苹果 3 月份停止销售 14 款产品，其中 3 款产品没有替代品https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-stopped- sell-14-products-in-march-include-3-with-no-replacements/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-stopped- sell-14-products-in-march-include-3-with-no-replacements/#respondZac Hall Tue, 31 Mar 2026 01:31:51 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045887

苹果本月推出了大量新硬件。新款 iPhone、iPad、Mac 等设备为您带来难忘的三月体验。苹果本月还停产了许多产品——不仅仅是为了给新硬件腾出空间。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-stopped- sell-14-products-in-march-include-3-with-no-replacements/feed/ 0 1045887 苹果子公司因违反俄罗斯制裁规则在英国被罚款https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-subsidiary-fined-in-the-uk-for-breaching-Russia-sanctions-rules/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-subsidiary-fined-in-the-uk-for-breaching-Russia-sanctions-rules/#respondMarcus Mendes Tue, 31 Mar 2026 01:19:13 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045890

在入侵乌克兰后，英国因违反俄罗斯制裁而对苹果子公司处以超过 50 万美元的罚款。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-subsidiary-fined-in-the-uk-for-breaching-Russia-sanctions-rules/feed/ 0 1045890 iOS 26.5 beta 1：以下是所有新功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-1-here-are-all-the-new-features/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-1-here-are-all-the-new-features/#respondChance Miller Tue, 31 Mar 2026 00:38:04 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045877

Apple 今天为开发者发布了 iOS 26.5 beta 1 。此次更新不包括任何备受期待的 Siri 新功能，但有一些值得注意的变化。请参阅下文，了解 iOS 26.5 beta 1 中所有新内容的完整摘要。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-1-here-are-all-the-new-features/feed/ 0 1045877 WhatsApp 正在开发专用的 CarPlay 应用程序，现已可供 Beta 测试者使用https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/whatsapp-is-working-on-a-dedicated-carplay-app-available-now-for-beta-testers/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/whatsapp-is-working-on-a-dedicated-carplay-app-available-now-for-beta-testers/#commentsMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 23:33:53 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045869

基于 TestFlight 的最新 WhatsApp Beta 版引入了原生 CarPlay 应用程序，将该应用程序的实用性扩展到当前基于语音的界面之外。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/whatsapp-is-working-on-a-dedicated-carplay-app-available-now-for-beta-testers/feed/ 1 1045869 MagSafe Monday：ESR 5 卡钱包比苹果的 FineWoven 钱包更好吗？ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/is-the-esr-5-card-wallet-better-than-apple-finewriting/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/is-the-esr-5-card-wallet-better-than-apple-finewriting/#respondBradley C Mon, 30 Mar 2026 23:01:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043272

多年来我尝试过许多 MagSafe 钱包，但尚未找到完美的一款。在使用Apple FineWoven 钱包几周后，我决定换成 ESR 的五卡 MagSafe 钱包（黑色）。虽然 ESR 选项支持五张卡片，但与 FineWoven 版本的三张卡片相比，它肯定要厚得多。尽管体积较大，但由于其独立的 ID 插槽和可容纳多张卡的能力，它很快就成为我目前的日常携带物品。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/is-the-esr-5-card-wallet-better-than-apple-finewriting/feed/ 0 1043272 苹果加大对vibe编码应用的打击力度，从App Store下架“Anything” https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/#commentsMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 22:30:01 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045859

据The Information报道，苹果公司上周从 App Store 下架了 Vibe 编码应用程序“ Anything ”，理由是其应用程序审查指南中的自我遏制规则。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/feed/ 10 1045859 苹果在欧盟测试第三方配件的自动音频切换https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 21:53:50 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045834

随着苹果不断做出改变以遵守欧盟的数字市场法案，苹果正在测​​试一个新框架，该框架可为第三方音频配件带来自动音频切换功能。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/feed/ 0 1045834 iOS 26.5 增加了对欧盟第三方配件的实时活动支持https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 20:41:24 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045821

根据 9to5Mac 看到的新代码，苹果正在努力在欧洲的 iOS 26.5 中支持第三方配件中的实时活动。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/feed/ 0 1045821 iOS 26.5 的消息应用程序在测试版中具有 RCS 端到端加密https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5s-messages-app-has-rcs-end-to-end-encryption-in-beta/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5s-messages-app-has-rcs-end-to-end-encryption-in-beta/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 30 Mar 2026 20:31:28 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045814

iOS 26.5 beta 1现已向开发者开放，其中包含 新的苹果地图功能，暗示有 新的应用内订阅选项，但没有 Siri 升级的迹象。 iOS 26.5 还为 Messages 提供了对端到端加密 RCS 消息传递的支持。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5s-messages-app-has-rcs-end-to-end-encryption-in-beta/feed/ 29 1045814 Apple 推出 macOS Sonoma 14.8.6 和 macOS Sequoia 15.7.6 候选版本https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-rolls-out-macos-sonoma-14-8-6-and-macos-sequoia-15-7-6-release-candidates/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-rolls-out-macos-sonoma-14-8-6-and-macos-sequoia-15-7-6-release-candidates/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 19:54:31 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045816

在发布macOS Sonoma 14.8.5 和 macOS Sequoia 15.7.5 不到一周后，Apple 现已为下一次更新确定了候选版本。以下是详细信息。
